title: RedemptionTypeEnum
description: Specifies the contractual redemption or conversion features associated with a debt security.

oneOf.title: ContingentConvertible
oneOf.description: Specifies a debt security that can be converted into equity if a pre-defined trigger event occurs.

oneOf.title: Convertible
oneOf.description: Specifies a debt instrument that can be converted into common shares.

oneOf.title: Exchangeable
oneOf.description: Specifies a debt security that can be converted to equity in a company other than the issuing company.

oneOf.title: Extraordinary
oneOf.description: Specifies a debt security that can be redeemed early if certain extraordinary events occur.

oneOf.title: Sinkable
oneOf.description: Specifies a debt security that requires the issuer to periodically set aside money to buy back portions of the debt.
